2606.22550.title: Training-Free Semantic Correction for Autoregressive Visual Models
2606.22550.paper_summary: Autoregressive visual models (AVMs) based on next-scale prediction have emerged as a prominent paradigm for image and video synthesis. However, decomposing the generation process into discrete scales with varying granularities in AVM makes semantic errors difficult to identify and correct, thereby undermining the quality of the final output. Prior efforts to enhance AVM can be categorized into training-based and training-free approaches. Although training-based efforts to enhance AVM generation quality come at substantial computational cost, existing training-free methods neglect intermediate generation states, leaving semantic errors undiagnosed and allowing them to accumulate into the final output. In this paper, we focus on training-free paradigms and propose Gazer, a framework that integrates multimodal large language model feedback into the AVM sampling loop for in-generation semantic correction. Concretely, Gazer operates via two cooperating stages: the Reflective Diagnosis stage diagnoses semantic errors from intermediate states, while the Semantic Correction stage rewinds and rectifies the generation trajectory to realign with the target prompt. Experiments on compositional image and video benchmarks demonstrate that Gazer improves semantic alignment and compositional accuracy across multiple AVMs without additional training.
2606.22550.paper_summary_zh: 自回歸視覺模型（AVMs）基於下一尺度預測已成為圖像和視頻合成的一個重要範式。<lb/>然而，在AVM中將生成過程分解為不同粒度的離散尺度使得語義錯誤難以識別和修正，從而削弱了最終輸出的質量。<lb/>先前增強AVM的努力可以分為基於訓練和無需訓練的方法。<lb/>儘管基於訓練的增強AVM生成質量的努力需要付出相當大的計算成本，但現有的無需訓練的方法忽略了中間生成狀態，導致語義錯誤未被診斷，並使其累積到最終輸出中。<lb/>在本文中，我們專注於無需訓練的範式，並提出Gazer，一個將多模態大型語言模型反饋整合到AVM採樣循環中的框架，以進行生成過程中的語義修正。<lb/>具體而言，Gazer通過兩個協作階段運作：反思診斷階段從中間狀態診斷語義錯誤，而語義修正階段則回溯並修正生成軌跡，以重新對齊目標提示。<lb/>在組合圖像和視頻基準上的實驗表明，Gazer在多個AVM中提高了語義對齊和組合準確性，而無需額外的訓練。
2606.22550.author: Junhao Chen et.al.
2606.22550.authors: Junhao Chen, Chanyu Zhu, Zheqi Lv, Keting Yin, Shengyu Zhang
